'''jashanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hdr|hdr]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hdr|hdr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jashanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæshængæth|jæshængæth]] || [[word:jæshængæj|jæshængæj]] || [[word:jæshængæsh|jæshængæsh]] || [[word:jæshængæ|jæshængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashashangath|jashashangath]] || [[word:jashashangaj|jashashangaj]] || [[word:jashashangash|jashashangash]] || [[word:jashashanga|jashashanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jashangath|jashangath]] || [[word:jashangaj|jashangaj]] || [[word:jashangash|jashangash]] || [[word:jashanga|jashanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashafngath|jashafngath]] || [[word:jashafngaj|jashafngaj]] || [[word:jashafngash|jashafngash]] || [[word:jashafngaf|jashafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jashangatha|jashangatha]] || [[word:jashangaja|jashangaja]] || [[word:jashangasha|jashangasha]] || [[word:jashangaka|jashangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jashangath|jashangath]] || [[word:jashangaj|jashangaj]] || [[word:jashangash|jashangash]] || [[word:jashanga|jashanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jashangathal|jashangathal]] || [[word:jashangajal|jashangajal]] || [[word:jashangashal|jashangashal]] || [[word:jashangakal|jashangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jashangathatha|jashangathatha]] || [[word:jashangajaja|jashangajaja]] || [[word:jashangashasha|jashangashasha]] || [[word:jashangaka|jashangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jashangathan|jashangathan]] || [[word:jashangajan|jashangajan]] || [[word:jashangashan|jashangashan]] || [[word:jashangakan|jashangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jashangathaoro|jashangathaoro]] || [[word:jashangajaoro|jashangajaoro]] || [[word:jashangashaoro|jashangashaoro]] || [[word:jashangakaoro|jashangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
